plugins.name: claude-audit
plugins.description: AI-readiness audit for any Claude Code project. Analyzes CLAUDE.md, hooks, skills, agents, and MCP setup — produces a structured improvement report with prioritized actions.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

plugins.name: rkstack
plugins.description: AI development workflow: 21 skills for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, code review, security audit, safety guardrails. One plugin, adapts to your project.

plugins.name: hindclaw-claude-plugin
plugins.description: Long-term memory for Claude Code via Hindsight with HindClaw server-side access control. Auto-recall on every prompt, auto-retain after responses, bank creation from templates.
